summary: Cloud deployment compatibility release for hosts that use prebuilt frontend assets instead of local Node/npm.

notes: No database schema migration is included in this release.
Function exposure remains at 44 public schema functions, 0 PostgreSQL PUBLIC execute grants, 3 anon executable functions, and 16 authenticated executable functions.

deployment.cloud: Build frontend with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.16.46, sync frontend/dist when the host has no npm, then rebuild approval-app with APP_IMAGE_TAG=V0.16.46.
notes: deploy/scripts/deploy-aliyun.sh now supports SKIP_FRONTEND_BUILD=1 when frontend/dist is already present.
This release supersedes V0.16.45 for production deployment.

verification: Run npm --prefix frontend run build with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.16.46 and the production VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY.
Run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against the deployed site.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.16.46 after deployment.
Run scripts/smoke-timesheet-withdraw.sql against production in rollback mode.
